basic_details.job_title: GKV Haridwar Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor, LDC and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor / Non-Teaching Posts
basic_details.application_mode: Application form to be emailed with documents
basic_details.short_information: Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya (GKV) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 02-07-2026 for self-financed (SFS Rules-2020) contractual teaching posts of Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor, along with several non-teaching posts, at its Haridwar campus. This is a Notification Released / Application Open stage recruitment, with the last date to submit applications fixed as 15-07-2026. This article covers all teaching and non-teaching posts announced under this single notification.

important_dates.exam_date: Not Announced Yet (to be informed separately to eligible candidates)

application_fee.details: Teaching posts: Rs. 600/- Non-teaching posts: Rs. 300/- | The fee must be deposited online in the university's bank account, and the payment receipt must be carried to the interview.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: Not Announced Yet Maximum Age: Not Announced Yet Age Relaxation: Not Announced Yet

qualification.details: Not Announced Yet in the notification. | Candidates are advised to study the applicable regulation/rules in detail before applying, as instructed in the official notification.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Technical Assistant, LDC, LDC (Accounts), Lab Attendant, Bus Driver, Bus Attendant

category_wise_breakdown.post_name: Technical Assistant, LDC, LDC (Accounts), Lab Attendant, Bus Driver, Bus Attendant

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Technical Assistant, LDC, LDC (Accounts), Lab Attendant, Bus Driver, Bus Attendant

salary_details.details: Pay is fixed as per SFS Rules-2020: | Professor: Rs. 80,000/- per month Associate Professor: Rs. 60,000/- per month Assistant Professor: Rs. 40,000/- per month Physical Trainer/Coach: Rs. 21,200/- per month Technical Assistant: Rs. 17,500/- per month LDC / LDC (Accounts): Rs. 11,900/- per month Bus Driver: Rs. 11,900/- per month Lab Attendant / Bus Attendant: Rs. 10,800/- per month

selection_process: Selection will be made through an interview. The date and time of the interview will be communicated separately by the university. For non-teaching posts
the process may also include a skill test/written examination as per the university's RR Rules-2020. Beyond this
a detailed selection process (such as multiple stages or weightage) is Not Announced Yet.
how_to_apply: Download the Application Form for the desired post.
Fill the form completely and attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience proof, and the fee payment receipt.
Email the complete application with all documents/certificates to [email protected] on or before 15-07-2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.
No mode of application other than email will be accepted.
Carry the original documents and one photocopy of each document/certificate (that were emailed) at the time of the interview/skill test/written exam.

content_sections.heading: Quick Highlights
content_sections.text: Organization: Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya (GKV), Haridwar Post Name: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Physical Trainer/Coach, Technical Assistant, LDC, LDC (Accounts), Lab Attendant, Bus Driver, Bus Attendant Total Vacancies: Not Announced Yet Apply Mode: Offline application form submitted via email Last Date: 15-07-2026 Qualification: As per UGC/AICTE/NCTE/Pharmacy Council of India regulations (post-wise) Age Limit: Not Announced Yet

content_sections.heading: GKV Haridwar Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF and Official Website
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised to download the official application form and read the notification carefully before applying. Official Notification PDF: Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Official Website: www.gkv.ac.in

content_sections.heading: GKV Haridwar Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The notification lists posts by faculty, department, gender-specific requirement and campus, but does not specify numeric vacancy counts against each post. The post-wise break-up is given below.

tables.caption: Faculty of Yoga and Physical Education
Faculty of Medical Science and Health

rows.post_name: Technical Assistant, LDC, LDC (Accounts), Lab Attendant, Bus Driver, Bus Attendant

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Not Announced Yet in the notification. Candidates are advised to study the applicable regulation/rules in detail before applying, as instructed in the official notification.

rows.post_department: Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, and Management (BBA/MBA)

rows.qualification_norms_applicable: As per Pharmacy Council of India Regulation 2014

rows.post_department: Non-Teaching Posts (Physical Trainer/Coach, Technical Assistant, LDC, LDC (Accounts), Lab Attendant, Bus Driver, Bus Attendant)
rows.qualification_norms_applicable: As per University RR Rules-2020; B.Com preferred for LDC (Accounts); Bus Attendant must be 10th pass; Driver qualification as per RR Rules-2020

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: Not Announced Yet Maximum Age: Not Announced Yet Age Relaxation: Not Announced Yet

content_sections.heading: Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Pay is fixed as per SFS Rules-2020: Professor: Rs. 80,000/- per month Associate Professor: Rs. 60,000/- per month Assistant Professor: Rs. 40,000/- per month Physical Trainer/Coach: Rs. 21,200/- per month Technical Assistant: Rs. 17,500/- per month LDC / LDC (Accounts): Rs. 11,900/- per month Bus Driver: Rs. 11,900/- per month Lab Attendant / Bus Attendant: Rs. 10,800/- per month

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Teaching posts: Rs. 600/- Non-teaching posts: Rs. 300/- The fee must be deposited online in the university's bank account, and the payment receipt must be carried to the interview.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made through an interview. The date and time of the interview will be communicated separately by the university. For non-teaching posts, the process may also include a skill test/written examination as per the university's RR Rules-2020. Beyond this, a detailed selection process (such as multiple stages or weightage) is Not Announced Yet.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Duly filled application form downloaded from the university website Self-attested copies and original educational/academic certificates Experience certificates (if applicable) Application fee payment receipt One photocopy each of all documents/certificates emailed with the application, to be produced at the time of interview/skill test/written exam along with originals

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: www.gkv.ac.in Download the Application Form for the desired post. Fill the form completely and attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience proof, and the fee payment receipt. Email the complete application with all documents/certificates to [email protected] on or before 15-07-2026 . Applications received after this date will not be considered. No mode of application other than email will be accepted. Carry the original documents and one photocopy of each document/certificate (that were emailed) at the time of the interview/skill test/written exam.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GKV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application by email is 15-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in GKV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The total number of vacancies is Not Announced Yet. The notification lists posts by department, gender requirement and campus, but does not mention numeric vacancy counts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for GKV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 600/- for teaching posts and Rs. 300/- for non-teaching posts, payable online to the university's bank account.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for GKV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be filled offline (form downloaded from the website) and then emailed with all documents to [email protected].

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility criteria for GKV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligibility varies by post and is based on UGC, AICTE, NCTE, Pharmacy Council of India regulations, or the university's own RR Rules-2020, as detailed in the Eligibility Criteria section above.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for GKV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through an interview (and a skill test/written exam for certain non-teaching posts), with the date to be announced separately by the university.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for posts under GKV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Pay ranges from Rs. 10,800/- to Rs. 80,000/- per month depending on the post, as per SFS Rules-2020.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for GKV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should check the official website, www.gkv.ac.in, for the notification and application form.
